parameters.name: q
parameters.value: artificial intelligence OR AI models OR machine learning OR GPT OR Claude OR MCP

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: AI technology OR GPT OR Claude OR MCP OR artificial intelligence

parameters.text:
Analyze these AI news articles and create a comprehensive daily briefing:

{{ $json.allArticles }}

Provide your response in the following format:

📊 EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
[2-3 sentences summarizing overall AI landscape]

🔥 TOP TRENDING STORIES
[For each of top 5 popular articles: Title, Source, 2-3 sentence summary, URL]

📰 LATEST DEVELOPMENTS
[For each of top 5 newest articles: Title, Source, 1-2 sentence summary, URL]

🔑 KEY INSIGHTS
[3-5 actionable bullet points]

🏷️ TOPICS COVERED
[Hashtags of main topics]

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert AI news analyst specializing in tracking developments in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and AI tools.

Your task is to analyze a collection of AI-related news articles and create a comprehensive daily briefing.

## Analysis Guidelines
- Focus on practical implications and technical details
- Highlight new model releases, MCP developments, API changes, industry shifts
- Be concise but informative
- Use professional technical tone
- Include relevant metrics/numbers when available

## Output Requirements
- Executive summary: 2-3 sentences capturing overall trends
- Top stories: Detailed 2-3 sentence summaries with context
- Latest developments: Brief 1-2 sentence updates
- Key insights: 3-5 actionable bullet points
- Topics: Hashtags for main themes

## Important
- Always include article URLs
- Separate popular articles from newest articles
- Focus on accuracy over hype

parameters.content:
## 1. Trigger

Runs daily at 9 AM via cron. Fires both news source fetches in parallel — if one source fails, the other continues (onError: continueRegularOutput).

## 2. Data Collection

Fetches up to 50 articles from NewsAPI and GNews in parallel. Both use HTTP Header Auth credentials — API key must NOT be inline. Merged before processing.

## 3. Filter & Rank

Deduplicates by URL, drops articles older than 24h, scores by keyword relevance and source reputation. Splits into two ranked lists: top 10 by engagement score, top 10 by recency.

## 4. AI Summarization

GPT-4o-mini produces a structured briefing: executive summary, top 5 trending, top 5 newest, key insights, and topic hashtags. Prompt tuned for technical AI audience.

## 5. Distribution

Three output channels: Slack (working), Outlook email (incomplete — parameters empty), LinkedIn post (incomplete — no content wired). Wire up or remove before activating.
